name: vscode-work-terminal-v3
description: A VS Code port of work-terminal with a board-first workflow and per-item terminal sessions.

workTerminal.claudeCommand.description: Legacy Claude launch command used when workTerminal.agentProfiles is unset.

workTerminal.claudeExtraArgs.description: Legacy Claude extra arguments used when workTerminal.agentProfiles is unset.

workTerminal.copilotCommand.description: Legacy Copilot launch command used when workTerminal.agentProfiles is unset.

workTerminal.copilotExtraArgs.description: Legacy Copilot extra arguments used when workTerminal.agentProfiles is unset.

workTerminal.strandsCommand.description: Legacy Strands launch command used when workTerminal.agentProfiles is unset.

workTerminal.strandsExtraArgs.description: Legacy Strands extra arguments used when workTerminal.agentProfiles is unset.

workTerminal.defaultWorkingDirectory.markdownDescription: Optional default working directory for shell sessions and agent profiles without an override. Use an absolute path or a workspace-relative path. Leave blank to use the first workspace folder.

workTerminal.shellCommand.markdownDescription: Optional shell command for `Open shell session`. Leave blank to keep using VS Code's integrated shell profile. Multi-token commands are supported.

workTerminal.shellExtraArgs.markdownDescription: Optional extra arguments appended after `workTerminal.shellCommand` when opening shell sessions.

workTerminal.agentProfiles.markdownDescription: Optional full profile configuration. When unset, Work Terminal derives the built-in Claude, Copilot, and Strands profiles from the legacy command settings. Use `Work Terminal: Manage Profiles` for ordered and custom profile edits, and use VS Code Settings for shell and default working-directory behavior.

id.description: Stable profile id used for launches and restored sessions.

kind.description: Profile behavior. Claude adds resume session ids. The other kinds launch the configured command directly.

command.description: Command used to launch the profile. Multi-token commands are supported and validated before launch.

extraArgs.description: Extra arguments appended after the command tokens.

usesContext.description: When true, Work Terminal sends the work item context prompt after launch.

workingDirectory.description: Optional absolute or workspace-relative working directory override for this profile. Leave unset to use workTerminal.defaultWorkingDirectory or the workspace folder.

scripts.check: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run lint && pnpm run test
scripts.package: pnpm run check && pnpm run build && pnpm exec vsce package
scripts.vscode:prepublish: pnpm run check && pnpm run build
